series_metadata.series_title: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting leases obtained by the Ohio Organized Crime Investigations Commission (OOCIC) for task force and investigative work.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 2 years after expiration of lease. ; Paper: Retain 2 years after expiration of lease, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
